SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF APR-14-2017 - SMALL CLAIMS JUDGMENT AFFIRMED. THE SMALL CLAIMS JUDGMENT OF APR-14-2017 REMAINS THE SAME. THIS JUDGMENT ON APPEAL IS FINAL. EXHIBITS WILL BE DESTROYED PURSUANT TO CCP 1952.

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Apr-14-2017 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Zhong Qiu Cui, Appellant - assisted by Ai Dong Ni Court certified Mandarin interpreter
Rui Hai Liang and Xio Ling Zhao -Respondent -assisted by Court assisted Cantones interpreter Bannie Chow

This cause comes on regularly for Trial de Novo. All parties and witnesses are sworn

The Court reviews the file.

The Court poses questions to the parties.
The Court hears testimony from the parties.
The Court reviews the submitted exhibits.
The Court accepts copies of the exhibits.
The Court returned all exhibits in open court.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the matter is taken under submission.

The clerk will return any exhibit that may have been inadvertantly leftbehind upon the ruling of the court.

Judge: A. James Robertson, II; Clerk: R. Goulding; Not Reported (502)
